name: Uptime monitoring with Slack and Gmail alerts
description: Reads a list of URLs from Google Sheets, checks each one via HTTP, logs results back to the sheet, and sends Slack alerts and Gmail notifications for any downtime. Adapted from n8n's uptime monitoring with scheduled triggers workflow.

source.originalName: Host your own uptime monitoring with scheduled triggers

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for URL list and logging

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for downtime alerts

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for uptime alerts

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for email alerts

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID with URLs to monitor

sheetRange.description: Sheet range with columns: URL, Name

steps.name: Read monitored URLs from Google Sheets
Log uptime results to Google Sheets
Build alert content for down sites
Send downtime alert email via Gmail
Build Slack Block Kit uptime report
